prompt: A single [architectural element] isolated in frame — [lens] so tightly framed that the element fills the image with no building context visible, [material quality] the complete subject: [surface detail], [color palette] limited to [two or three tones], [light source] the single defining variable casting [shadow type] that reveals the element's three-dimensional form, no context — the [architectural element] as pure form and material, minimalist architectural photography still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
